name: Maestro's Cold War 2
short_description: Addictive yet chill. An immersive Cold War sandbox. Revive the Cold War in this classic strategy game—easy to pick up, yet challenging and deep, offering endless replayability.
detailed_description:
Maestro’s Cold War 2 is a replayable grand-strategy sandbox about the world’s tensest standoff of the Cold War.

Play as the USA or the USSR, manage Prestige, Budget, and National Policies, and bend history through policies, proxies, diplomacy, and brinkmanship.

Easy to pick-up but hard and deep enough to offer a challenge, this is the kind of game you will keep coming back to.

How Does the Game Work?

The objective is simple: earn more prestige points than your opponent.

You gain prestige by improving diplomatic relations and signing treaties with countries across the globe. At the same time, your opponent will work relentlessly to undermine the nations in your bloc and shift the balance of power in their favor.

Beyond diplomacy, you must also manage your nation’s internal policies and carefully plan how to exploit the geopolitical landscape to weaken your rival over time.

Are you ready to lead your ideology to global dominance—or will history repeat itself?

If you're familiar with my work, you know I focus on crafting games you can enjoy in a single evening, yet with enough depth to offer endless replayability.

I’m confident the game's simple mechanics paired with historical events that force you to make impactful choices, will provide over 100 hours of entertainment.

Now:

Have fun! (this is an order, not a wish!)                                                                                                                       -Maestro Cinetik

English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Spanish - Latin America*, Simplified Chinese*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Italian*, Polish*
*languages with full audio support
